schema.description: Brain self-merge graduation track record (WS-44). Brain promotes from data-files-only allowlist to apis/brain/ code after N=50 clean merges with zero unreverted reverts in the 48-hour blitz. Logs every promotion + every revert. Per cheap-agent-fleet.mdc rule #6.

track_record.clean_merges: int (count of green-CI merges since last promotion or epoch)
